creator: biplane55@gmail.com
text:
For some reason, gpsd 3.9 will fail to build with an ``ncurses/ncurses.h file not
found'' error. I know this is impossible, because I have both the base version of
ncurses installed, as well as the ports version, and no other port has yet given
me problems with ncurses.

How-To-Repeat:
All you have to do is to try to compile gpsd 3.9 from the ports tree.

Fix:
Unfortunately, I am not sure how to fix this problem.
